strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across distributed, high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Low-latency microservices experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership (CTO/VP) or scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, liquidity, or trade decisioning
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff individual contributor with strong distributed-systems credentials and emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the resume does not show executive-level leadership, organizational scaling, regulated fintech experience, or production multi-agent AI ownership required for a CTO role at a venture-backed fintech scale-up.
